message:
fix(conformance,host,raptorq): clippy doc lint + code quality improvements

Conformance golden vectors (6 files):
- Backtick-wrap identifiers in doc comments to satisfy
  clippy::doc_markdown (COSE_Sign1 → `COSE_Sign1`, HelloRetry →
  `HelloRetry`, ZoneCheckpoint → `ZoneCheckpoint`, etc.)
- Add `# Panics` doc sections to all vector constructor methods that
  call .unwrap() on hex decode (holder_proof, datagram, signing)
- hpke: rename recipient_sk → recipient_secret to fix
  clippy::similar_names lint, add #[allow(clippy::similar_names)]

Conformance harness:
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on NodeId values that are moved into
  NetworkMessage fields (clippy::redundant_clone)
- Use std::slice::from_ref(&a) instead of &[a.clone()] for single-
  element partition calls

fcp-host/doctor:
- Extract type alias SelfCheckFn for boxed closure (readability)
- Use String::new() instead of "".to_string() (clippy::manual_string_new)
- Replace match with if-let for Ok-only handling (clippy::single_match)

fcp-raptorq/decode:
- Rename shadowed variable decoded → decoded_payload for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
